# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "devTeamGroupObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the development team Azure AD group"
      }
    },
    "ciCdServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "monitoringServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the monitoring service principal"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "networkAclDefaultAction": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Deny",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Default action for network ACLs. Use 'Deny' to restrict access to allowed networks only."
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of IP address ranges (CIDR) allowed to access the Key Vault"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "secretsReadOnlyPermissions": {
      "secrets": [
        "get",
        "list"
      ]
    },
    "secretsManagePermissions": {
      "secrets": [
        "get",
        "list",
        "set",
        "delete",
        "recover",
        "backup",
        "restore"
      ]
    },
    "copy": [
      {
        "name": "virtualNetworkRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]",
        "input": {
          "id": "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('virtualNetworkRules')]]",
          "ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint": false
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "ipRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]",
        "input": {
          "value": "[parameters('allowedIpRanges')[copyIndex('ipRules')]]"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "[parameters('networkAclDefaultAction')]",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('virtualNetworkRules')]",
          "ipRules": "[variables('ipRules')]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": "[variables('secretsReadOnlyPermissions')]",
            "metadata": {
              "description": "Primary application - read-only access to secrets"
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('ciCdServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": "[variables('secretsManagePermissions')]",
            "metadata": {
              "description": "CI/CD pipeline - manage secrets for deployments"
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devTeamGroupObjectId')]",
            "permissions": "[variables('secretsReadOnlyPermissions')]",
            "metadata": {
              "description": "Dev team group - read-only access to secrets"
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('monitoringServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "list"
              ]
            },
            "metadata": {
              "description": "Monitoring service - list-only access for health checks"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/', 'auditLogs')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 365
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 365
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "principle": "Least privilege access is enforced - each identity receives only the minimum permissions required.",
        "accessModel": "Access policies grant scoped permissions per identity rather than broad shared access.",
        "networkSecurity": "Network ACLs default to Deny; configure allowedSubnetResourceIds and allowedIpRanges for your environment.",
        "auditLogging": "Diagnostic settings capture all AuditEvent logs for compliance and incident response.",
        "productionReadiness": [
          "Verify each objectId maps to the correct identity before deployment.",
          "Populate allowedSubnetResourceIds with your application VNet subnets.",
          "Populate allowedIpRanges only for known CI/CD or admin IP ranges.",
          "Consider migrating to RBAC authorization (enableRbacAuthorization: true) for finer-grained control.",
          "Connect diagnostic logs to a Log Analytics workspace or storage account.",
          "Review and remove any unused access policies regularly.",
          "Rotate secrets on a defined schedule and enable expiration dates on all secrets."
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
